# MK QuizFlow

MK QuizFlow is a privacy-first, local-first web application designed to turn PDF slides and study notes into quizzes and flashcards.

## Key Features
- **Local-First Processing**: Browser-side PDF text extraction using pdf.js. No document upload is saved on the server.
- **Quick Mode**: Heuristic keyword-matching questions generated locally without AI keys or network calls.
- **AI Mode**: Context-aware multiple choice, true/false, fill-in-the-blanks, and short answer question sets using the Vercel AI SDK and Vercel AI Gateway.
- **SRS Flashcards**: Spaced repetition self-grading flashcards (Again, Hard, Good, Easy) stored in IndexedDB.
- **Weak-Topic Analysis**: Educational synthesis of incorrect player answers into topic strength matrices.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 16 (App Router)
- Strict TypeScript & Tailwind CSS v4
- IndexedDB via idb package
- Vercel AI SDK
